This summary encapsulates both critical aspects—construction location and inclination degree—as per medical documentation referenced by Agent1 during its analysis process leading up to selecting 'Option B' accurately reflecting these characteristics pertinent to understanding what makes Catalán’s device unique clinically speaking.
